description:
Analyze the packet size (frame length) distribution in the capture file '200722_tcp_anon.pcapng' (located in ~/Documents/captures/). Create a report at '/home/ga/Documents/captures/packet_size_report.txt' containing the total packet count, minimum, maximum, and average packet sizes, and a breakdown of packet counts and percentages for specific size buckets (0-79, 80-159, 160-319, 320-639, 640-1279, 1280-2559 bytes). Identify the bucket with the highest packet count as the 'Dominant Bucket'. 

The report must follow this exact format:

=== Packet Size Distribution Report ===
Capture File: 200722_tcp_anon.pcapng
Total Packets: <number>
Min Size: <number> bytes
Max Size: <number> bytes
Avg Size: <number> bytes

=== Size Bucket Distribution ===
0-79: <count> packets (<percentage>%)
80-159: <count> packets (<percentage>%)
160-319: <count> packets (<percentage>%)
320-639: <count> packets (<percentage>%)
640-1279: <count> packets (<percentage>%)
1280-2559: <count> packets (<percentage>%)

=== Dominant Bucket ===
<bucket_range>: <count> packets
